entities.description: pdf is a file format mentioned in the context of parsing failures
a ground truth block is a specific unit of data that may be lost during parsing
the candidate pool is a collection of items from which blocks are retrieved
recall is an evaluation metric used to measure the contribution of retrieved blocks
0 is the specific numerical value representing the recall contribution when a block is lost

relations.description: a ground truth block can be lost due to pdf parsing failures
a ground truth block is considered unretrievable if it does not exist in the candidate pool
the loss of a ground truth block results in a recall contribution of 0
the recall contribution is explicitly stated as 0 when a ground truth block is lost
